creator: sasaki12@gmail.com
text:
My port svn revision is 383418, and OS version is 9.3-STABLE.

I've checked thoroughly, and I guess this is produced by r382631
change for Mk/bsd.ruby.mk. Old format is yaml, but new format is ruby.

svn log -r r382631 Mk/bsd.ruby.mk says the following:

------------------------------------------------------------------------
r382631 | swills | 2015-03-30 11:47:07 +0900 (Mon, 30 Mar 2015) | 5 lines

Update ruby-gems to 2.4.5

Note this is a big upgrade and the way gemspecs are generated changed. As a
result, all patched gemspecs had to have new patches.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Is this same issue?
